name: automate-sunat
description: Seller-to-SUNAT browser automation with a live dashboard.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web:wait"
scripts.dev:web:wait: node tools/wait-for-server.mjs && npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -n app,electron -c blue,green "npm run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npx electron desktop/dist/src/main.js"
scripts.desktop:start: concurrently -k -n server,electron -c blue,green "npm start" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3030/api/state && npx electron desktop/dist/src/main.js"
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.reset:data: rm -f data/automation.db data/automation.db-shm data/automation.db-wal && rm -rf data/screenshots data/traces data/auth
